message:
fix(doctor): downgrade partial-index warnings and add REINDEX on --fix

Partial index corruption messages ('row N missing from index')
are a known frankensqlite behavior for WHERE-clause filtered
indexes, not actual data corruption. Downgrade to Warn.

When --repair is passed, run REINDEX to rebuild all indexes.

Addresses #171

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
